heading: Funding
label: 1144 Funding
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Young Fishermen’s Development Act, and not as part of titles I and II of which comprise this chapter.Pub. L. 89–454

children.heading: Authorizations
children.label: a Authorizations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: Derivation
children.label: b Derivation
children.text: Funds to carry out the activities under this subchapter shall be derived from amounts authorized to be appropriated pursuant to the preceding subsection that are enacted after .January 5, 2021
